channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.0-beta2 2019-09-18T16:51:23Z This release is identical, feature wise, to 3.0.0-beta1. Bug fixes: Remove space from patch in composer.json (13263095) Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates: drush cache:rebuild drush updatedb Run Lightning configuration updates: drush cache:rebuild drush update:lightning 3.
